message:
test(ft-conformance): logit scipy subprocess conformance [bd-b5of]

Adds torch_logit_scipy_subprocess_conformance covering 24 inputs:
the symmetric center 0.5 (logit(0.5) = 0), interior values 0.001 /
0.1 / 0.25 / 0.75 / 0.9 / 0.999, near-boundary values 1e-15 and
1-1e-15 where the (1-p) subtraction loses precision, transcendental
constants (1/π, 1/e), the boundary poles 0 and 1 (logit → ±inf),
out-of-range values where scipy returns NaN (-0.5, 1+ε, 2.0, -1.0),
and ±inf / NaN propagation.

Tests the eps=None path (the canonical scipy reference). The
eps != None clamp path is a PyTorch-specific extension and is not
exercised here — that's covered by existing unit tests.

ULP-tolerant comparison (4 ULP relative or 1e-15 absolute floor)
since tensor_logit composes through tensor_sub + tensor_div +
tensor_log. Sister harness to torch_entr_scipy_subprocess_conformance.
Files closure for the logit slice of frankentorch-b5of.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
